intended_function: fs laser pulse → carbon deposition

intended_function: 532 nm excitation → ODMR/Ramsey

possible_mismatch: Charge-state instability under cryogenic laser irradiation. C_contr UNKNOWN at 10 mK.

notes: Room-T contrast does not predict 10 mK behavior

intended_function: MW drive → Rabi oscillations for spin control

failure_consequence: MW heating exceeds budget; Rabi undefined

intended_function: Species-resolved pressure; FC correction

intended_function: H2 below threshold after implementation

intended_function: No cross-contamination between gas species

intended_function: REJECTED_DESIGN — AOM cannot gate 100 fs pulses
